title: croton repens
intro: Croton repens, also known as the creeping croton, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, characterized by its small, white or pink flowers and creeping stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Croton repens include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
